stemHtml: The rigidity of a gyroscope is greater when its rotational speed is..

options.a: higher and the mass of the spinning wheel is closer to the axis of rotation.
options.b: higher and the mass of the spinning wheel is located further from the axis of rotation.
options.c: lower and the mass of the spinning wheel is located further from the axis of rotation.
options.d: lower and the mass of the spinning wheel is closer to the axis of rotation.
